rulings.Case Title: THE GREAT STAR THEATER, INC. VS. JULIE LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Julie Lee And 626 Jackson Street Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 14, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANTS ANNA WONG, HELEN LEE, RENA CHIN, BEULAH KU, AVA KU, MELINDA LOW, HARRY FONG, HAROLD FONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULLED. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's First Cause of Action is OVERRULED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to state a cause of action for adverse possession. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's Second Cause of Action is OVERRULED. Plaintiff's claim for declaratory relief is premised on his claim for adverse possession. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
